title: Accountability: Accreditation and Performance Indicators
description: Conroe ISD follows state and federal standards to measure how well the district and its schools are performing academically. These standards track outcomes like student achievement, graduation rates, and overall school quality, resulting in ratings that are made available to the public. Parents and community members can use these ratings to understand how their local schools are doing and how Conroe ISD compares to other districts across Texas.
